title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Straw Hat Pirates, Yamato, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Castle Interior - Live Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 'A shower of beams!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A constant barrage of beams...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That sounds like tech frankly would love to get his hands on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! That won't work!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah! sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are so many layers of bandages...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take them off before you give me the damn shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh... well, let's not get hung up on the details.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you sure you know what you're doing?! Heeeey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The Wano Sea - Polar Tang

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hang in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Don't die on us, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Dammit! If only the captain were here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if basic first aid is enough!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has already coughed up a ton of water, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Straw Hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Open your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: silence

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we pour some medicine down his throat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No! We should give him an inject-tion!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: His face is pale!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What do we do?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: MeAAT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ONI- GASHINA, SKULL DOME -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Right brain tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WAAAH!! Wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why are the headliners attacking us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: iron bro, focus on sasaki and leave these guys to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gahahaha, are you guys helping me? I thought you were his lackeys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Weez, weez

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if the entire armored unit is being controlled, this is still treason!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You really are a tough bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must've dealt you countless fatal blows already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're pretty tough yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's a real pain in the ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like we've been betrayed on the live floor as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm gonna head there and skewer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ALL OF THOSE UNLOYAL COCK- ROACHES!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now get out of my way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: KARAKURI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Helix sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: again with that sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You ain't going no- where!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While I've got no clue why those punks joined us,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not complain- ing if it means I have a few more friends!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 48 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
